title: rosa coriifolia subsp. lucida
intro: Rosa coriifolia subsp. lucida is a lesser-known subspecies of the Rosa coriifolia plant, a type of wild rose native to the Indian subcontinent and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia subsp. lucida are thought to include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antioxidant-rich properties that may help to protect against cell damage. Rosa coriifolia subsp. lucida is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and may also be used in topical creams and oils to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
